WELCOME TO THE

LARZ ANDERSON AUTO MUSEUM

Home to America's Oldest Car Collection

About

STEP INTO THE MUSEUM

A Century of Cars and Culture Just Minutes from Boston

Just a ten-minute drive from downtown Boston, the Larz Anderson Auto Museum in Brookline, Massachusetts is a must-visit destination for car enthusiasts, families, and visitors exploring the Boston area. Located in the scenic 64-acre Larz Anderson Park, this classic car museum showcases “America’s Oldest Car Collection” inside the historic Carriage House. Visitors can enjoy rotating museum exhibits, automotive history lectures, family-friendly programs, classic car shows, and the museum’s signature Lawn Events. A visit offers a memorable day of exploration, history, and enjoyment at one of New England’s most beloved automotive museums.

​

The Andersons’ collection began with an 1899 Winton 4-hp Runabout and grew to include 32 motorcars and horse-drawn carriages, forming one of the most significant historic car collections in New England. After Isabel Anderson’s death in 1948, the collection was entrusted to the VMCCA, leading to the creation of the Larz Anderson Auto Museum. Today, the museum features automotive exhibits, educational forums, car history programs, and themed Lawn Events that celebrate the legacy of early motoring, classic cars, and automotive history in Massachusetts.

About

Our Mission

A Century of Cars and Culture Just Minutes from Boston

The Museum's primary goal is its continued support of the community through educational outreach and the preservation of our permanent collection of early automobiles. The Larz Anderson Auto Museum hopes to serve as a resource for your automotive and cultural interests.

SUPPORT
THE MUSEUM

Your support helps us preserve this legacy for future generations. Every donation, membership, and sponsorship helps fund exhibitions, educational programs, community events, and the ongoing care of our historic collection.

​

By supporting the Museum, you’re not only helping to maintain a piece of automotive history—you’re also investing in education, preservation, and a vibrant community that celebrates the art and innovation of the automobile.

BECOME A MEMBER

Become a Member and Drive into Automotive History – Exclusive Access, Free Admission, and More!

LEAVE IT TO LARZ

Support the Larz Anderson Auto Museum by donating your car, motorcycle, or any item of value. Your donation helps fuel our exhibits, events, and educational programs, and it may be tax-deductible. 

MAKE A DONATION

Your donation helps preserve automotive history, support educational programming, and keep the legacy of Larz Anderson alive for future generations.

OUR EVENTS

Celebrating automotive heritage and community connections at the Larz Anderson Auto Museum

The Larz Anderson Auto Museum in Brookline, Massachusetts, brings automotive history to life through exhibitions, community programs, and a full calendar of car shows and events. Upcoming events include Cars + Coffee, Corvette Day, German Car Day, British Car Day, Porsche Day, Tutto Italiano, BMW Day, speaker sessions, family-friendly gatherings, and more. View the full event schedule for dates, tickets, registration details, and visitor information.
